title: AlphaCraft Essentials
description: The Essential Modpack you need to play on any 'AlphaCraft SMP' Instance!
body:
AlphaCraft Essentials is a modpack focused on performance, accesibility and overall fun! It is created to enhance your Minecraft experience by increasing the games performance, adding Quality of Life upgrades, and adding extra features, while maintaining the Vanilla feeling.

This modpack is perfect for Singleplayer playthroughs. The modpack balances your performance, so your system will not be affected by unnecessary loads. 

Not only is it perfect for singleplayer, but for Multiplayer as well, for which it was intended. Additions such as voice chat and emotes make it a fun modpack to play with your friends on multiplayer servers.

* The AlphaCraft Essentials Modpack was created by me for use on the 'AlphaCraft SMP' server. This means it will not recieve an update for every new Minecraft version, but rather an update for each instance of the AlphaCraft SMP we play.
